test_input: I want to build the first EOS operating dashboard for Empyrean Studios.

flow.step_1: User types or speaks input in OperatorPanel command box
flow.step_2: Transcript/text is editable in textarea before submission
flow.step_3: submitCommand() dispatches to sendTextCommand() or sendVoiceTranscript()
flow.step_6: parseDexResponse() maps backend fields to frontend DexResponse type
flow.step_7: OperatorPanel renders: intent, summary, packet preview, topology, human actions, approvals, propagation
flow.step_8: Session history updates with new turn (input + response)
